footerTagline: Find flights no one else can find. 600+ airlines, best prices, full guarantee.
priceUnavailable: Current prices available directly in search
allFlightsDirect: All flights found are direct flights.
directFlightsAvailable: Direct flights are available on this route.
noDirectFlights: There are currently no direct flights on this route — connections only.
routeDescriptionTemplate: Find and book cheap flights from {origin} ({originCode}) to {destination} ({destCode}) — compare prices with Airpiv.
routeIntroOpeningLongHaul: Looking for a flight from {origin} to {destination}?
routeIntroDistanceLongHaul: The route covers roughly {distance} km, making it a long-haul flight.
routeIntroDistanceShortHaul: The route covers roughly {distance} km — a short-haul hop of just a few flying hours.
routeIntroClosingLongHaul: Airpiv compares hundreds of airlines in real time for this long-haul route, so you see the true total price including all fees — transparent, with no hidden costs.
routeIntroClosingShortHaul: Airpiv compares hundreds of airlines for this route in seconds, so you find the best price for your flight — transparent, with no hidden costs and a best-price guarantee.
routeFaqDistanceQuestion: How far is it from {origin} to {destination}?
routeFaqDistanceAnswerLongHaul: The distance is roughly {distance} km — a long-haul flight.
routeFaqDistanceAnswerShortHaul: The distance is roughly {distance} km — a short-haul flight.
routeFaqAirportAnswer: This route uses {destCode} airport. Exact flight times and airlines are shown in the search results.
routeFaqBestTimeQuestion: What is the best time to fly from {origin} to {destination}?
routeFaqBestTimeAnswerLongHaul: This long-haul route is usually cheapest when booked 2–3 months ahead, outside school holidays and the Christmas/Easter periods.
routeFaqBestTimeAnswerShortHaul: This short-haul route is usually cheapest in the shoulder season (April–May, September–October) and on weekday flights, especially Tuesdays and Wednesdays.
routeFaqCheapestQuestion: How do I find the cheapest flight from {origin} to {destination}?
routeFaqCheapestAnswer: Airpiv compares hundreds of airlines for this route in real time. The more flexible your travel dates, the better your chance of a great price.
routeBestTimeHeading: Best time to fly this route
routeBestTimeBodyLongHaul: For long-haul routes like {origin} → {destination}, it usually pays to book 2–3 months in advance — prices on this distance typically rise noticeably in the last 3–4 weeks before departure. Travelling outside school holidays and the Christmas/Easter periods tends to be cheaper on long-haul routes, as demand drops noticeably during those windows.
routeBestTimeBodyShortHaul: For short-haul routes like {origin} → {destination}, the shoulder-season months (typically April–May and September–October) are cheaper than peak summer or Christmas. Midweek flights — especially Tuesdays and Wednesdays — also tend to be cheaper than weekend flights, since business-traveller demand drops on weekends.
routeDurationFaqQuestionTemplate: How long does the flight from {origin} to {destination} take?

citySingleRouteDescriptionTemplate: Direct connection between {city} and {otherCity}: compare prices and book cheap flights with Airpiv.
cityMultiAirportDescriptionTemplate: {city} is served by {count} airports ({codes}). Compare all routes with Airpiv.

countrySingleRouteDescriptionTemplate: Direct connection between {otherCity} and {country}: compare prices and book cheap flights with Airpiv.
countryManyRoutesDescriptionTemplate: Over {count} flight connections to {country}. Compare all destinations and airlines in real time with Airpiv.
airportSingleRouteDescriptionTemplate: {code} airport in {city} offers one direct connection. Compare the price and book with Airpiv.
airportMixedHaulDescriptionTemplate: From {code} airport in {city} you can reach both European and intercontinental destinations. Compare all routes.
airportAllRoutesDescriptionTemplate: {count} flight connections to and from {city} ({code}). Compare all routes and prices with Airpiv.
airportIntroTemplate: {code} airport serves {city}. Here you'll find all the flight routes Airpiv offers for this airport — compare prices and book directly.
cityIntroTemplate: Discover all flight connections to and from {entity}. Airpiv compares hundreds of airlines in real time to find the best price for your trip.
countryIntroTemplate: Compare flight prices to every destination in {entity}. Airpiv searches hundreds of airlines in real time so you can find the cheapest connection for your trip.
countryFewRoutesDescriptionTemplate: {count} destinations in {entity}, compared side by side. Find the cheapest connection with Airpiv.
airlineIntroTemplate: {airline} operates several routes that Airpiv tracks in its price comparison. Compare all available connections from this airline and find the best price.
airlineSingleRouteDescriptionTemplate: {airline} flies the {otherCity} – {otherCity2} route. Compare prices and book cheap with Airpiv.
airlineManyRoutesDescriptionTemplate: {count} flight connections operated by {airline}, compared side by side. Find the cheapest route with Airpiv.
routeIntroOpeningDomesticShortHaul: Looking for a domestic flight from {origin} to {destination}?
routeIntroClosingLongHaulV2: Airpiv tracks this long-haul route around the clock, so you can lock in a fair price before fares climb — no hidden fees, ever.
routeIntroClosingShortHaulV2: Airpiv keeps an eye on this route day and night, helping you catch the best fare the moment it drops — no hidden fees, ever.
routeIntroCarrierSingle: Just one airline currently operates this route.
routeIntroCarrierMulti: {count} airlines compete on this route, giving you more options to compare.
routeIntroPopular: This is one of the more popular routes on Airpiv, with strong demand from travelers.
routeFaqAirlineAnswerSingle: Currently, one airline operates this route.
routeFaqAirlineAnswerMulti: Currently, {count} airlines operate this route, so it's worth comparing them.
routeBestTimeBodyDomesticLongHaul: For a longer domestic route like {origin} → {destination}, prices tend to move less dramatically than on international routes — booking 3–5 weeks ahead is usually enough, and midweek departures are typically the cheapest option.
routeBestTimeBodyDomesticShortHaul: For a short domestic hop like {origin} → {destination}, fares are mostly driven by how far ahead you book and the day of the week rather than the season — midweek departures (Tuesday and Wednesday) tend to be the cheapest, and prices usually firm up in the final 1–2 weeks before departure.
routeBestTimeTipDirect: All flights currently found on this route are nonstop, so timing your booking is mostly about price rather than juggling connection times.
routeBestTimeTipConnecting: This route currently only has connecting flights, so it's worth comparing layover lengths as well as price when you book.
routeBestTimeTipMixed: Both nonstop and connecting flights are available on this route — nonstop options are usually worth the price difference for shorter trips.
routeBestTimeClosingV1: As always, fares can shift day to day, so it's worth checking prices again closer to your planned travel dates.
routeBestTimeClosingV2: These are general booking patterns, not a guarantee — the best way to know for sure is to compare live prices for your exact dates.
